thinking.text:
The user wasn't able to provide two matching details. Unfortunately, per policy, I need to verify the user by confirming any 2 out of 4 fields (date of birth, email, phone number, address). The phone number matched but the email didn't match. I can't proceed with verifying their identity with only one matching field.

Let me think about what options are available. The policy says I should verify identity before accessing or modifying customer information. Without proper verification, I cannot change the email address.

Let me check the knowledge base to see if there are any other verification methods available.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
I understand that can be frustrating! Unfortunately, I do need to verify at least two of the four identity fields (date of birth, email, phone number, or address) before I can make any changes to your account.

Let me check the knowledge base to see if there are any other options available for you.
